A SWOT analysis highlights IPG's transitional phase ahead of its $750 million acquisition by Omnicom, with recent organic revenue misses offset by strong margin improvements and upward EPS revisions for 2025-2026. No major news events reported in the last 24 hours as of January 23, 2026.
